examples: If you're taking part in a debate you need to persuade the listeners of the soundness of your argument.
They reason that since top executives evidently have faith in the bank's financial soundness, those worrisome rumors must be false.

By separating money from credit, you inject safety and soundness into the lending circuit.
The third prong of his early success, beyond knowledge and financial soundness, was reputation.
